title: Hi, Becki! Thank you for being such an amazing resource for all things 911!  Q: How likely do you think it is some or all of the cast might need to drop out of the April Rescueverse event on 4/18 due to filming obligations?  I’d appreciate your opinion as someone knowledgeable about their production cycle. I understand it’s happened before, so I’m nervous to lock in tickets given what’s non-refundable since I’m not interested in the other guests. Just trying to understand the odds. Thanks in ad…
